categories.name: IT'S OUR TURN TO SACK ROME!!!

questions.clue: 390 B.C.:These people usually associated with ancient France sack Rome

455 A.D.: These people, whose name is now synonymous with pillage & destruction, sack Rome
1084 A.D.: Having successfully invaded England 18 years before, they then sack Rome
1527 A.D.: Spanish & German troops working for this "Empire" end the High Renaissance by sacking Rome
